narrative:
Reading 4-A (precinct in Hamilton County) has 840 registered voters, with 58.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.6 percentage points.
